name: Micro1
description: Managed data labeling teams for AI labs that scaled from $7M to $50M ARR in 2025.

seo.title: Micro1 — AI API / SDK for Developers

when_to_use: Evaluating AI/ML candidates with automated technical assessments
Screening engineers for LLM and ML engineering roles at scale
Building talent pipelines for specialized AI engineering positions
Reducing bias in technical hiring with standardized AI evaluation

pros: Competitive pricing vs Scale or Surge
Track record with frontier lab contracts
review.verdict: A credible Scale alternative that's been winning AI-lab business on cost and speed.
review.best_for: AI labs and enterprises needing managed labeling at mid-to-large scale
review.not_for: Small teams that can self-manage labeling on Labelbox or similar
